requiredBehaviors.behavior: AgenC shows first-run onboarding only in an interactive session with an AgenC home, persists seen counts, and stops showing once completion is recorded.

The wizard preserves the donor step sequence shape while replacing the donor account step with provider selection plus a connection check: preflight, theme, provider, connection check, API-key readiness, security, terminal setup.
The TUI shell renders onboarding before the normal transcript on first run and routes composer submissions to the onboarding controller until completion.
The cited project-onboarding state and step files have AgenC-owned counterparts that detect AGENC.md project instructions and persist per-project seen/completion state.

intentionalReductions: The donor account sign-in path is not carried by default; OB-01 uses provider selection with Grok as the default and a readiness check.
API-key paste capture and LocalAuthBackend writes are deferred to OB-09.
Terminal setup records an explicit wizard step without mutating shell profile files in OB-01.
